arts.ttl: David Moyes ‘feels a bit’ for Arne Slot after Merseyside derby red card
arts.sum: Slot is facing a possible touchline ban after he was sent off by referee Michael Oliver after the full-time whistle.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth-round TV schedule announced as BBC and ITV both get huge matches
arts.sum: Kick-off times and TV schedules for the eight FA Cup fifth-round matches have been confirmed, with holders Manchester United and 2023 winner Manchester City both involved

arts.ttl: Arne Slot confesses Everton vs Liverpool red card regret - 'I would love to do it differently'
arts.sum: The Dutchman was banned from conducting a post-match press conference at Goodison Park and spoke for the first time on Friday

arts.ttl: Liverpool manager Arne Slot explains red card against Everton: ‘The emotions got the better of me’
arts.sum: Slot said he was angry at Everton scoring an equaliser after the allocated added time, with the Premier League leaders conceding a 97th minute equaliser in the 2-2 draw

arts.ttl: Arne Slot speaks for first time on Everton chaos as Liverpool boss faces extended ban
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has now given his version of events after he was sent off at the end of a dramatic Merseyside derby in midweek by referee Michael Oliver

arts.ttl: Marcel Gaillard: Crystal Palace's first overseas star
arts.sum: Watch any Premier League fixture, and it becomes clear that football really is the global game. There are players of all nationalities and backgrounds, and fans who have made the trip from halfway around the world – or just from the local pub. But it wasn’t always that way.

arts.sum: Live updates from the AXA Training Ground as Liverpool boss Arne Slot speaks for the first time on after he was sent off in chaotic scenes following a controversial end to the Merseyside derby
